sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Extreme drought putting strain on lake levels across Middle TN, TVA says
feed.summary: Ongoing dry conditions are causing low lake and river levels in Middle Tennessee, according to the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) and the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Nashville District. Due to a lack of significant spring rainfall, reservoirs are much lower than typical for this time of year, with some, like Wolf Creek and Dale Hollow, experiencing their lowest April levels in over a decade. Water must be strategically released to balance hydropower and navigation needs while preserving already low levels.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE: Trip.com Group (TCOM) Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Trip.com Class Action Lawsuit- Hagens Berman
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Trip.com Group (TCOM) after a 17% decline in stock price following an investigation by Chinese regulators into alleged monopolistic practices. The lawsuit seeks to represent investors who purchased Trip.com securities between April 30, 2024, and January 13, 2026. The firm urges investors with substantial losses to come forward as it investigates whether Trip.com misled investors about its AI pricing tool and business model sustainability.

feed.title: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. Announces Initiation of Common Stock Cash Dividend, Payable on June 15, 2026
feed.summary: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. has announced the initiation of a cash dividend for its common stock. The board of directors declared a dividend of $0.20 per common share, which will be payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. The company's common shares are traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol "TCBI."

feed.title: Oncology Institute (NASDAQ: TOI) chief files Form 4 with no trades
feed.summary: Jeffrey Langsam, Chief Clinical Officer of Oncology Institute (NASDAQ: TOI), filed a Form 4 indicating his executive status but reported no stock transactions. The filing shows no purchases, sales, exercises, gifts, or other changes in his stated beneficial ownership. This Form 4 is primarily administrative, recording no alteration to his holdings during the period.

feed.title: Oncology Institute (TOI) CAO Kristin England files Form 4 showing no insider trades
feed.summary: Oncology Institute (TOI) Chief Administrative Officer Kristin England has filed a Form 4, indicating no insider trades during the reported period. The filing details zero purchases, sales, derivative exercises, gifts, tax withholdings, or restructuring-related transfers. This neutral filing suggests no change in her reported holdings.

feed.title: Assessing Tower Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:TSEM) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Tower Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:TSEM) has seen significant share price momentum, with a 56.5% return over 90 days, bringing its stock price to US$201.27. Despite this, the company is considered 16.3% overvalued with a narrative fair value of $173.00, according to analysts' consensus. The valuation relies on assumptions of ambitious growth and margin improvements, but also faces risks from heavy CapEx commitments and concentrated technology exposure.

feed.title: BofA, EY Strike $2.5M Deal To Settle MOVEit Breach Claims
feed.summary: Bank of America and EY have reached a $2.5 million settlement to resolve claims stemming from the May 2023 MOVEit file transfer application breach. The settlement will benefit approximately 200,000 individuals impacted by the data breach and comes as part of multidistrict litigation.

feed.title: PNC Financial Services Group Stock Analysis: Outperformance vs. Underlying Concerns in 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group has shown strong stock performance, outperforming the S&P 500 by 19.7% over the last six months with its stock price rising to $228.02. However, analysts advise caution due to concerns about its net interest income growth, low net interest margin, and projected decrease in tangible book value per share. The report suggests that despite a reasonable current valuation of 1.5 times forward price-to-book ratio, it may not present a significant buying opportunity.

feed.title: Alibaba Leads Asia-Pacific IaaS Market With 22.5% Share in 2025, Gartner Says
feed.summary: Alibaba Cloud secured the top position in the Asia-Pacific Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS) market for 2025 with a 22.5% share, according to Gartner. This growth is attributed to strategic investments in AI-optimized infrastructure and a focus on enterprise AI demand. Globally, Alibaba Cloud was the fourth-largest IaaS provider, with its market share increasing to 7.7%.
feed.source: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media
feed.source_domain: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media

feed.title: Executive pay and ownership detailed in Spruce Power (NYSE: SPRU) 10-K/A
feed.summary: Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU) filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) detailing governance data for 2025, including executive compensation, ownership, and auditor matters. The filing outlines CEO Christopher Hayes' 2025 compensation package of $650,000 salary, a $650,000 cash bonus, and $894,806 in RSU grants, with performance-based incentives and multi-year vesting schedules. It also reveals that Steel Partners Holdings L.P. beneficially owned 18.4% of Spruce Power as of April 8, 2026.

feed.title: TARA (NASDAQ: TARA) files Form 144 listing multiple proposed share sales
feed.summary: Protara Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TARA) has filed a Form 144, indicating proposed sales of common stock by an affiliate/insider. The filing details multiple planned dispositions in late February and early March 2026, totaling over 178,000 shares across several dates. Jefferies LLC is named as the underwriter for these proposed sales.

feed.title: Baker Brothers reports multiple common-stock sales (NASDAQ: TARA)
feed.summary: Baker Brothers Life Sciences, L.P. has reported multiple sales of common stock in Protara Therapeutics (NASDAQ: TARA) via a Form 144 filing. The filing details several sale events in February and March 2026, totaling millions of dollars, with associated share counts. Jefferies LLC is also noted as an underwriter reference from September 2020.

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon Corp 8-K Filing Details for April 23, 2026 – Company Information, Security Titles, and Regulatory Compliance 23
feed.summary: BNY Mellon has issued $1.5 billion in new callable senior medium-term notes across two tranches, due in 2032 and 2037, to enhance financial flexibility and potentially fund corporate initiatives. This debt issuance increases the company's leverage and could impact its credit profile, but the callable feature offers management flexibility. Investors should monitor how the additional leverage is managed, as the proceeds could be used for general corporate purposes, debt refinancing, or growth.

feed.title: Number of employees of Tuniu Corp. Sponsored ADR Class A – FWB:0TU
feed.summary: This page on TradingView provides financial information for Tuniu Corp. Sponsored ADR Class A (FWB:0TU), specifically focusing on the number of employees. It indicates that the market is closed for this stock on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. The content primarily lists various features, products, and services offered by TradingView.

feed.title: BRIEF-SB Financial Group Q1 EPS USD 0.69
feed.summary: SB Financial Group (SBFG) reported its Q1 earnings, with an EPS of USD 0.69. This brief update comes from Refinitiv / Reuters.

feed.title: Rural virtual care delivers equal health improvements, Teladoc Health, Inc.
feed.summary: Teladoc Health Inc. reports that virtual care is effectively closing the healthcare access gap between rural and urban areas, with rural patients showing similar rates of enrollment, engagement, and improved health outcomes as their urban counterparts. This indicates the significant potential of telemedicine in fostering health equity across various geographic locations. The company continues to expand its virtual healthcare offerings, including dietitian-led nutrition programs and advocacy for virtual care over urgent care visits to reduce costs and improve engagement.

feed.title: TD Bank Group to Issue NVCC Subordinated Debentures
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank (TD) announced a domestic public offering of C$1 billion in medium term notes, which are non-viability contingent capital (NVCC) constituting subordinated indebtedness. These Notes will be issued and sold through a dealer syndicate led by TD Securities Inc., as detailed in a press release from Newswire.ca. The article also notes that this content is syndicated and not reviewed or endorsed by The Globe and Mail.

feed.title: Triumph Financial Earnings Call Highlights Transport Pivot
feed.summary: Triumph Financial's Q1 earnings call highlighted a significant pivot towards a transportation-finance platform, with strong growth in transportation revenue, Factoring margins, and the Payments network. While legacy banking segments faced pressure, the company reaffirmed aggressive 2026 goals, including 20% transportation revenue growth and improved operating margins in Factoring and Payments. Management acknowledged elevated expenses and regulatory risks but expressed confidence in the long-term trajectory of its fintech ecosystem.

feed.title: TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) Net Interest Margin Near 3.9% Reinforces Bullish Earnings Narratives
feed.summary: TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) reported strong Q4 2025 results with US$105.2 million in revenue and US$33.6 million in net income, leading to a basic EPS of US$1.04. The bank maintains a healthy net interest margin of 3.89% and a low level of non-performing loans, demonstrating solid core profitability. Despite trading below its DCF fair value, its P/E ratio is above the US Banks industry average, and its forecast earnings growth is modest compared to the broader US market.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies Q1 2026 EPS Near US$20 TTM Reinforces Bullish Earnings Narrative
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies reported Q1 2026 revenue of US$1.6 billion and basic EPS of US$4.85, contributing to a trailing twelve-month EPS of US$19.99 and 12.5% earnings growth. The company maintained a 15% net margin, consistent with analyst expectations for margin improvement driven by higher-margin products. While the stock's current P/E ratio of 32.4x is above the industry average and its DCF fair value is below the current share price, the strong EPS growth supports a bullish long-term narrative for the stock.

feed.title: Ecolab (ECL) Valuation Check As Water Navigator IQ Launch And Earnings Optimism Shape Sentiment
feed.summary: Ecolab (ECL) is gaining attention following the launch of its AI-enabled Water Navigator IQ platform and optimistic analyst forecasts for upcoming earnings. The stock is currently trading at US$271.45, with a "most popular narrative" suggesting a 15% undervaluation at $319.29 due to pricing power and digital investments. However, a "richer multiples" view points to a P/E of 36.9x, indicating potential valuation risk despite the positive outlook.

feed.title: SkyWest Inc. Earnings Call Highlights Growth Amid Headwinds
feed.summary: SkyWest Inc. (SKYW) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with GAAP net income of $102 million and EPS of $2.50, slightly above last year's performance. The company highlighted resilient profitability, accelerating free cash flow, and an expanding fleet strategy despite facing headwinds such as maintenance bottlenecks, lower cash, and elevated fuel prices. Management projected full-year 2026 GAAP EPS in the low-to-mid-$11 range, emphasizing durable fundamentals and strategic flexibility.

feed.title: TJX Stock Crosses $60 Billion in Sales: Does the Street High Target of $193 Hold Up?
feed.summary: The TJX Companies (TJX) achieved a new milestone, surpassing $60 billion in net sales for the first time in fiscal 2026, reaching $60.4 billion, up 7% year-over-year. Despite management's conservative guidance for fiscal 2027, Wall Street analysts maintain a mean price target of $171.78, with a high of $193. The article explores both bull and bear cases, considering TJX's impressive comp growth, expansion plans, and potential challenges from discretionary spending softness.

feed.title: SBC (SBC) CEO sells 3.1M shares in offering, retains 79.3M
feed.summary: SBC Medical Group Holdings Inc.'s Chairman and CEO, Yoshiyuki Aikawa, sold 3.1 million shares of common stock at $3.0225 per share in an underwritten public offering that closed on April 21, 2026. Despite this sale, Aikawa retains a substantial direct holding of 79,304,460 SBC shares and additional indirect interests through other entities. The transaction was reported via a Form 4 SEC filing, detailing the sale and his remaining significant ownership.

feed.title: Columbia officers use SoundThinking alert to drive arrest in shooting case
feed.summary: A real-time ShotSpotter alert from SoundThinking led to an arrest and firearm recovery in Columbia, South Carolina. The alert initiated an investigation that provided critical intelligence weeks later. This incident, along with the recent successful apprehension of suspects in Aurora, Illinois, showcases the significant role of digital tools like SoundThinking's ShotSpotter in supporting police efforts to solve cases and enhance public safety, complemented by their new PlateRanger technology.

feed.title: Neurothera Labs Engages bullVestor for Investor Relations Activities
feed.summary: Neurothera Labs Inc. announced it has engaged bullVestor Median GmbH for investor relations activities. The agreement is for a 6-month period for a total cost of 300,000 euros, pending TSX Venture Exchange approval. bullVestor will provide marketing and investor relations services to enhance Neurothera's visibility with potential investors.

feed.title: Crypto News: AlphaPepe Presale AI DEX Update Whilst Dogecoin Price Prediction Targets $1
feed.summary: AlphaPepe has rolled out a major AI DEX update, pushing its presale past $940,000 and attracting over 7,900 holders, with its AlphaSwap demo exceeding 1,000 active users. This update occurs as Dogecoin price predictions are targeting $1, driven by new ETF access and institutional interest. AlphaPepe differentiates itself by having a strong product (AlphaSwap), a 10/10 BlockSAFU audit score, and presale momentum before its Q2 2026 exchange debut, contrasting with Dogecoin's more mature market position.

feed.title: STLA Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Stellantis N.V. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding stockholders of Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) about a class action lawsuit filed against the company. The lawsuit alleges that Stellantis misled investors regarding its 2025 earnings projections and its ability to capitalize on the growing electrification market. This allegedly resulted in a significant stock price drop after the company announced €22 billion in charges and a "reset" of its business due to an overestimation of the pace of EV adoption.

feed.title: Reynolds (REYN) director exercises 9,322 RSUs into common stock
feed.summary: Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. director Rolf Stangl converted 9,322 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common stock on April 23, 2026, increasing his direct holdings to 48,859 shares. This transaction, executed at $0.00 per share, represents a compensation-related equity delivery rather than an open-market purchase. The RSUs had no expiration date and vested on the conversion date.

feed.title: SkyWest anticipates 2026 GAAP EPS in the $11 area while preparing to launch the CRJ450 with United this fall
feed.summary: SkyWest (SKYW) anticipates its 2026 GAAP EPS to be around $11. This forecast comes as the company prepares to launch its CRJ450 service with United Airlines later this fall. The partnership with United is a significant development for SkyWest's operational strategies.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Margin Decline Tests Bullish High P E Narrative
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) experienced a decline in its net profit margin to 16.1% in Q4 2025, down from 17% a year prior, despite quarterly revenue growth. The company trades at a high P/E ratio of 45.2x, significantly above industry and peer averages, and its share price of US$309.70 exceeds its DCF fair value estimate of US$190.73. Analysts forecast a 6.6% annual revenue growth, which lags the broader U.S. market's 10.9%, raising concerns about its valuation given the softening margins and slower projected growth.

feed.title: DaVita Inc Forecasts Strong EPS Growth Ahead of Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: DaVita Inc. (DVA) is expected to announce strong financial results for Q1 2026, with analysts projecting a 20.5% increase in adjusted EPS to $2.41. The company has a history of outperforming earnings estimates and forecasts a full-year 2026 adjusted EPS of $14.16, exceeding market consensus. While its stock performance has lagged the S&P 500, it has outperformed its sector ETF, driven by revenue growth and improved reimbursement rates, yet analyst ratings remain cautiously optimistic with a "Hold" consensus.

feed.title: 'We are a food desert': Frustration over Wilson Dollar General’s nearly 3-month closure
feed.summary: Residents of Wilson, N.Y., are frustrated by the nearly three-month closure of their local Dollar General, which has left many without easy access to groceries and other essentials. The closure, which occurred on February 5 due to building issues that have since been resolved, has made the village a "food desert" as the only other local market has been closed since a fire in January 2025. Dollar General has stated they plan to reopen the store in the coming weeks.

feed.title: Sallie Mae: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Sallie Mae (SLM Corp.) reported strong first-quarter earnings, exceeding Wall Street expectations. The company announced net income of $308 million, or $1.54 per share, significantly higher than analysts' average estimate of $1.14 per share. Sallie Mae also beat revenue forecasts, with adjusted revenue reaching $375.4 million, and projects full-year earnings between $3.10 and $3.20 per share.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Announces Results of 2026 Annual Shareholders Meeting
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) recently held its 2026 annual shareholders' meeting, where key decisions were made regarding company leadership, executive compensation, and independent auditors. Shareholders elected twelve directors for a one-year term, approved executive officer compensation in an advisory vote, and ratified Ernst & Young LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2026. These outcomes highlight the company's commitment to strong governance and aligning executive incentives with shareholder interests.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor (ON) Gets Double-Digit PT Hike, Hits 2-Year High
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) reached an over two-year high, extending a 14-day rally after B. Riley upgraded its price target to $115 from $64, and its recommendation to "buy" from "neutral." The upgrade is based on expectations for in-line Q1 earnings, citing emerging growth and the company's exit from non-core revenue streams. Investors are also anticipating the chipmaker's Q1 2026 earnings release on May 4, 2026, and its outlook for Q2.

feed.title: Obsidian Energy Ltd (OBE) Shares Surge 5.9% -- What GF Score of 46 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Obsidian Energy Ltd (OBE) shares surged 5.9% to $12.39, but GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is significantly overvalued at $5.03, representing a 146.3% premium. The company's GF Score™ of 46/100 suggests average long-term return potential, with weak valuation and momentum ratings. No insider transactions have occurred in the last three months, which could be a red flag for investors given the overvaluation concerns.

feed.title: Two Harbors Investment prices $100M senior notes
feed.summary: Two Harbors Investment Corp. (NYSE: TWO) announced the pricing of $100 million aggregate principal amount of 8.625% senior notes due 2029. The notes will be issued at 99.117% of their principal amount, generating gross proceeds of approximately $99.117 million before expenses. This offering is part of an expansion of existing senior notes due 2029.

feed.title: Third Coast Bancshares reports Q1 EPS 88c, consensus 87c
feed.summary: Third Coast Bancshares (TCBX) reported Q1 EPS of 88 cents, slightly exceeding the consensus estimate of 87 cents. The company also reported a Q1 net interest margin of 3.67% and net interest income of $53.6 million, an increase from both the previous quarter and the previous year. CEO Bart Caraway highlighted the successful merger with Keystone, which is expected to drive sustainable growth and shareholder value.

feed.title: Texas Capital (TCBI) Margin Reset Reinforces Bullish Narratives Ahead Of Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Texas Capital Bancshares (TCBI) is approaching its Q1 2026 earnings with strong trailing 12-month earnings growth of 419.4% and a net profit margin of 26.1%. While improved margins and loan book growth are positive, concerns remain regarding a relatively high cost-to-income ratio (61.2%) and fluctuating non-performing loans. The stock's current valuation and analyst targets suggest limited immediate upside despite a higher DCF fair value, reflecting cautious expectations for future growth.

feed.title: How Thermo Fisher built FluidEase Pro, its first touchscreen pipette, over 2.5 years and 20 software revisions
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific developed the FluidEase Pro ClipTip, its first handheld pipette with a large touchscreen, over 2.5 years and 20 software revisions. The device features a 2-inch IPS LCD touchscreen, Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity, multiple user profiles, and electronic tip ejection, aiming to improve lab efficiency and reduce repetitive strain injuries. Customer feedback significantly influenced its design, including a rotating finger rest to accommodate different users.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace stock dips on guidance for slower revenue growth
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace's stock dipped following its guidance for slower revenue growth. Investors reacted negatively to the company's outlook on its future financial performance, which indicated a deceleration in revenue expansion. This updated guidance suggests a more cautious earning trajectory for the aerospace components manufacturer.

feed.title: Ameriprise Q1 2026 slides: EPS jumps 19%, wealth management margin hits 30%
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with adjusted operating earnings per share increasing by 19% to $11.26, surpassing analyst expectations. The company's wealth management segment was a key driver, seeing pretax adjusted operating earnings climb 20% and margins expand to 30.0%. Despite solid operational performance and a 6% dividend increase, shares declined 1.9% in after-hours trading due to broader market concerns.

feed.title: Provident Financial declares $0.14 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Provident Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PROV) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per share, maintaining dividend payments for 25 consecutive years. The dividend will be paid on June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026. Despite trading near its 52-week high, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock appears undervalued, even after the company recently missed Q2 FY2026 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Hasbro preliminary sales beat estimates, buoyed by ‘Magic’ - The Boston Globe
feed.summary: Hasbro reported preliminary first-quarter revenue exceeding analyst estimates, largely due to the strong performance of its fantasy card game, Magic: The Gathering, despite a prior cybersecurity attack. The article also covers various other business news, including the increasing age of CEOs, concerns about forced labor cotton in Labubu dolls, Spirit Airlines' financial discussions with the US government, Nike's corporate job cuts, accelerated insurance coverage for breakthrough medical devices, Kellogg's reintroduction of toy prizes in cereal, and a dip in US long-term mortgage rates.

feed.title: Big News in Big Tech – Apple CEO Tim Cook Will Retire; Insider John Ternus Takes Over
feed.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook is set to retire in September 2026 at age 65, transitioning to Executive Chairman, with insider John Ternus taking over as CEO. Cook led Apple to unprecedented financial growth, quadrupling annual profits and transforming its valuation from $350 billion to $4 trillion, despite criticisms about a slowdown in significant new product innovation and a cautious approach to AI. Ternus, a long-time Apple executive with a background in mechanical engineering, is tasked with reigniting the company's innovation engine and addressing concerning trends like executive departures and a perceived reliance on legacy products.

feed.title: SBC Medical Group Holdings chairman & CEO sells $9.37m in stock
feed.summary: SBC Medical Group Holdings (NASDAQ:SBC) Chairman and CEO Aikawa Yoshiyuki recently sold 3,100,000 shares of company stock for $9.37 million as part of an underwritten public offering. Despite this insider sale, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, and management has been aggressively buying back shares. The company recently reported Q4 EPS above expectations but revenue below forecasts, while BTIG reiterated a Buy rating with an $8.00 price target.

feed.title: Xcel Energy plans public safety power shutoff in parts of Colorado
feed.summary: Xcel Energy has announced plans for a public safety power shutoff in certain areas of Colorado. This measure is likely being implemented to mitigate wildfire risks, a common practice in regions prone to such events. The article does not specify the exact locations or the duration of the planned shutoff.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Joseph Erlinger Sells Shares of McDonald's Corp (MCD)
feed.summary: Joseph Erlinger, President of McDonald's USA, recently sold 333 shares of McDonald's Corp (MCD). This transaction is part of a larger trend of insider selling at the company, with no insider buys recorded over the past year against 26 insider sells. The stock is currently considered fairly valued, trading at $302.72 with a GF Value of $323.30.

feed.title: [Form 4] TELEDYNE TECHNOLOGIES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Inc. director Laura A. Black reported an acquisition of 319 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) of Teledyne common stock. These RSUs were granted under the company's 2014 Incentive Award Plan for non-employee directors, valued at $656.69 per unit, and will vest one year from the grant date. Following this transaction, Ms. Black directly holds 502 shares, including these 502 RSUs.
